tools.name: get_live_status
tools.description: Return verifiable public state: LIVE/DEMO/DEGRADED, commit, generated_at, data_as_of, 13F period and coverage.

tools.name: get_product_status
tools.description: Return go-to-market readiness, sellable boundaries, validation status and blocked full-quant artifact.

tools.name: get_research_readiness
tools.description: Return the current research, validation, data-quality and operator-review boundary without commercial claims.

tools.name: get_agent_stats
tools.description: Return aggregate 7/30-day MCP usage, fixed client families, tool mix and reliability. Initializations are not unique users; no IP, user-agent, version, arguments, prompts or responses are stored.

tools.name: list_funds
tools.description: Search and page through compact tracked 13F manager summaries. Use get_fund for positions and moves.

tools.name: get_fund
tools.description: Get a bounded public fund portfolio by SEC CIK, including filing metadata, positions, moves and history counts.

tools.name: get_stock
tools.description: Get bounded current 13F holders, quarter moves, quality warnings and ordinal research score for one ticker.

tools.name: preview_watchlist
tools.description: Evaluate 1 to 25 tickers against trusted 13F flow, quality gates and explainable watch/monitor/block triggers.

tools.name: discover_watchlist
tools.description: Rank trusted 13F watchlist candidates with explicit filters. Scores are ordinal research screens, not forecasts.

tools.name: get_confluence_signals
tools.description: Return public cached Confluence v1 signals. Scores are ordinal heuristic ranks, not probabilities.

tools.name: get_signal_history
tools.description: Read append-only Confluence signal revisions for audit and replay.

tools.name: get_confluence_methodology
tools.description: Return the frozen Confluence v1 methodology contract, including proof boundary and validation requirements.

tools.name: get_data_quality
tools.description: Return public read-only data-quality warnings. These are review signals, never automatic corrections.
